name: IRC_AIMATCHING_ENTY_TRK
description: This table is to track the injested candidate along with status of passed for successfully injested candidate and status of failed for non injested candidate while incremental injestion is being ran.

columns.Name: TRACKING_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of the table auto generated by sequence.

columns.Name: AFFECTED_ENTITY_ID
columns.Comments: This column stores the  id of the entity (like candidate, requisition).

columns.Name: ENTITY_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column will store the different entity type for which the ingestion tracking is happening (like CANDIDATE, REQUISITION).

columns.Name: ESS_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: This column stores the request id of the ESS job.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: This column will store the status of injestion (FAILED/PASSED).

columns.Name: ERROR_MESSAGE
columns.Comments: This column will store the error message of the entity which failed to injest.

columns.Name: INGESTION_COUNT
columns.Comments: Count to track number of times entity is ingested

columns.Name: INGESTION_TIME
columns.Comments: This column indicates the time stamp of last successful ingestion

columns.Name: FILE_NAME
columns.Comments: The name of thde json file posted.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
